title: Cocktail table - 30'' round w/30'' and 42'' poles
features: Our 30'' cocktail table kit serves double duty as a dining height table for two, or as a cocktail ''belly bar'' height table for a standing.
That's because we include two poles with the tabletop, base and coupler so you get basically two tables in one.
The tabletop is commercial grade 3/4'' plywood with vinyl bullnose edging.
Both the top and bottom are polyurethane coated to ensure a long life.
An aluminum coupler comes complete with screws to secure under the tabletop.
This houses the pole and completes the set with the included 28'' aluminum base.
A small amount of assembly is required.
The table knocks down for easy storage and transport.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more

faq.question: What size linen do you need for a 30'' Cocktail Table
faq.answer: For a 30" Cocktail Table we recommend a 90" tablecloth which you can find here: Click Here
